description: Baseline: 171 failing, 140 passing out of 311 web API tests

asi.breakdown: new_web_apis 28/38 fail, url 23/53 fail, form_data 44/44 fail, fetch 23/23 fail, performance 53/61 fail

name: Fix failing beam-mode web API tests

description: Implement all missing web APIs: performance marks/measures, FormData, EventTarget, DOMException, Event, File, ReadableStream, AbortSignal static methods, enhanced Headers, URL setters, URLSearchParams improvements, fetch body consumption and abort, Response statics

All 311 beam-mode web API tests pass. Fixed remaining issues: BroadcastChannel, try/catch async return injection, Promise resolve/reject empty args, for-await-of Symbol.asyncIterator, AbortSignal timer-based abort via timer queue, GC roots for global cache and broadcast channels
